---
title: "title of presentation"
author: "your name"
subtitle: "date of presentation"
format:
  revealjs:
    scrollable: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

Yo

##

was good
<iframe src="https://www.wikipedia.org" width="100%" height="600" style="border: none;"></iframe>
